info.name: Adobe Commerce Optimizer - Automotive Categories API
info.description:
Automotive parts & accessories category hierarchy via the Adobe Commerce Optimizer Data Ingestion REST API.

Two catalog families:
- parts-catalog: Engine, Brakes, Suspension, Electrical
- seasonal-catalog: Winter Prep, Summer Performance

Run request 0 first. The test script automatically saves the token to {{accessToken}}.

variable.description: Auto-populated by the Get Access Token test script.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Get an IMS access token. The test script on request 0 automatically saves it to the {{accessToken}} collection variable.

request.description: Exchanges client credentials for an Adobe IMS Bearer token using the OAuth 2.0 client_credentials flow.

item.name: Parts Catalog
item.description: Core parts-catalog family: Engine & Drivetrain, Brakes, Suspension & Steering, Electrical & Lighting.

request.description: Creates the top-level Engine & Drivetrain root in the parts-catalog family. Hierarchy is expressed entirely through the slug path.
Creates a level 2 subcategory nested under engine-drivetrain. The slug path establishes the parent-child relationship.
Creates a level 3 leaf category for Pistons & Rings.
Seeds two complete category trees in a single request: Brakes (root + 3 children) and Suspension & Steering (root + 2 children). Expected response: { "status": "ACCEPTED", "acceptedCount": 7 }

item.name: 5. Create Full Rich Category - Electrical & Lighting

request.description: Creates the Electrical & Lighting root with full SEO metadata, dual images with customRoles, plus three child subcategories in one request.

item.name: Seasonal Catalog
item.description: seasonal-catalog family: time-limited campaign trees for Winter Vehicle Prep and Summer Performance.

item.name: 6. Create Seasonal Family - Winter & Summer Campaigns

request.description: Creates two seasonal campaign trees under the seasonal-catalog family: Winter Vehicle Prep (root + 2 children) and Summer Performance (root + 1 child).

item.name: Attribute Metadata
item.description: Define product attribute metadata before creating products. Required for indexing and storefront display.

body.raw:
[
  {
    "code": "sku",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "SKU",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "SEARCH_RESULTS", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": false,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "name",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Product Name",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "SEARCH_RESULTS", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": false,
    "sortable": true,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "description",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Product Description",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL"],
    "filterable": false,
    "sortable": false,
    "searchable": false,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "shortDescription",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Short Description",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL"],
    "filterable": false,
    "sortable": false,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "price",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Price",
    "dataType": "DECIMAL",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "SEARCH_RESULTS", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": true,
    "searchable": false,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": []
  },
  {
    "code": "brand",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Brand",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "SEARCH_RESULTS", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": true,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 2,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "batteryType",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Battery Type",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": false,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "coldCrankingAmps",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Cold Cranking Amps (CCA)",
    "dataType": "INTEGER",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": true,
    "searchable": false,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": []
  },
  {
    "code": "groupSize",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Battery Group Size",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": false,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  },
  {
    "code": "partType",
    "source": { "locale": "{{locale}}" },
    "label": "Part Type",
    "dataType": "TEXT",
    "visibleIn": ["PRODUCT_DETAIL", "PRODUCT_LISTING", "SEARCH_RESULTS", "PRODUCT_COMPARE"],
    "filterable": true,
    "sortable": false,
    "searchable": true,
    "searchWeight": 1,
    "searchTypes": ["AUTOCOMPLETE"]
  }
]

request.description: Submits attribute metadata for the 5 required base attributes (sku, name, description, shortDescription, price) plus 5 automotive-specific custom attributes (brand, batteryType, coldCrankingAmps, groupSize, partType). Must be submitted before creating products.

item.name: Product-Category Assignment
item.description: Assign product SKUs to categories across one or more families.

request.description: Assigns the ProStart AGM Battery to categories in both families simultaneously: electrical-lighting/batteries-charging (parts-catalog) and winter-prep/cold-weather-batteries (seasonal-catalog).
